Video.summary: Martha and her friends make three pasta dishes, perfect for dinner or a dinner party.
Video.title: Pasta Night

Video.summary: Martha prepares pot-au-feu, a hearty French one-pot meal of meat and vegetables.
Video.title: A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu

Image.alt: A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu
A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu
A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu

Video.summary: Martha shares her love of houseplants. Learn all about the most popular and sought after houseplants, topiaries and begonias and how to take care of them.
Video.title: Amazing Houseplants

Video.summary: Succulents are known for their interesting textures. Martha explores how best to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.
Video.title: The World of Succulents

Video.summary: Martha visits the annual Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden, with a mesmerizing array of orchids designed by acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.
Video.title: The Incredible World of Orchids

Video.summary: With over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her tips for raising and caring for her flock of chickens. Then, learn the how-to of building a chicken coop.
Video.title: Hens and Chicks

Video.summary: One of the joys of gardening is having beautiful color all year. Bulbs and tubers are at the center of the show because of their beautiful blooms from spring to winter.
Video.title: Color For All Seasons

Video.summary: Martha demonstrates egg recipes; Martha visits her chicken coop.
Video.title: How to Properly Cook an Egg

Image.alt: How to Properly Cook an Egg
How to Properly Cook an Egg
How to Properly Cook an Egg

Video.summary: Martha makes onions: French onion soup, pearl onions, fried onion rings, pickled onions.
Video.title: Onions

Video.summary: Martha and her friend Monica create a Vietnamese feast.
Video.title: Vietnamese Cuisine

Video.summary: Martha takes shellfish to the next level.
Video.title: Shellfish

Video.summary: Martha serves up a delicious chicken dinner with fresh ingredients from her greenhouse; joined by her good friend Kevin Sharkey, they celebrate the perfect meal for a taste of home-cooked goodness.
Video.title: Perfect Chicken Dinner

Video.summary: Martha shares everything you need to create extraordinary holiday breads: Italian panettone, German stollen, and Greek Easter bread (studded with red eggs)
Video.title: Holiday Breads

Video.summary: Martha shares how to bake dark for maximum flavor: sticky toffee pudding, mini apricot tartes tatin, pear tart, and no-knead seeded overnight bread
Video.title: Bake it Dark

Video.summary: Martha shows how to make four of her favorite fruit desserts: passion fruit souffle, rhubarb-raspberry biscuit cobbler, raisin tart, and mango upside-down cake
Video.title: Extraordinary Fruits

Video.summary: Martha builds a brand new, half-acre raised bed vegetable garden on her farm! It's a step-by-step guide to designing, building, preparing the soil, and planting.
Video.title: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Image.alt: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Video.summary: Everything is coming up roses on Martha's Bedford farm; join Martha while she plants a new garden with almost 200 roses.
Video.title: Everything's Coming Up Roses

Video.summary: Martha's woodland gardens, including her azalea grove, burst with the last flowers of spring. Everything you need to know about hostas. Plus, bird watching.
Video.title: Azaleas, Hostas, and Wild Birds

Video.summary: Peek inside Martha's gardens past and present! Martha visits her former home, Turkey Hill; then back to her home in Bedford for a garden club tour.
Video.title: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Image.alt: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Video.summary: Martha serves up delicious homemade pizzas alongside friends and pizza chefs Christian Petroni and Dean Medico; featuring classic pizzas, signature sauces, and more.
Video.title: Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas

Image.alt: Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas
Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas
Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas

Video.summary: Martha shows how to properly plant trees including measuring, fertilizing, and watering; how to start trees from seedlings. Plus, Martha's new maze.
Video.title: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Image.alt: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Video.summary: Martha spotlights conifers, the cone-bearing evergreen trees. Take a tour of Martha's Christmas tree farm; learn how to properly move an established tree.
Video.title: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Image.alt: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Video.summary: Martha's vegetable greenhouse allows her to harvest a year-round bounty. Then, how to collect, store, and sow seeds. Plus, Martha makes her green drink.
Video.title: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse

Video.summary: Martha makes steak dinners cooked to perfection.
Video.title: Steak Night

Video.summary: Martha presents how to make bread pudding, chocolate pots de creme (an old-fashioned French custard), traditional steamed cranberry pudding, and light lemon pudding cakes
Video.title: Puddings

Video.summary: Martha shows you everything you need to know about pie baking; plus, three of her favorite recipes: peach crumble pie, classic key lime pie, and coconut cream pie
Video.title: Pies

Video.summary: Martha shares her love of citrus: orange chiffon cake, Shaker lemon pie, lime squares with pistachio graham cracker crust, citrus upside-down cake (guest Karen DeMasco)
Video.title: Citrus

Video.summary: Martha incorporates green tea (matcha) into desserts: green tea crepe cake, green tea cookies, green tea cupcakes (guest Chef E.J.), and green tea tuile with matcha ice cream
Video.title: Green Tea

Video.summary: Martha makes dumplings: Italian gnocchi and gnudi; her family recipe for Polish pierogi.
Video.title: Dumplings

Video.summary: Martha prepares grains: sauteed polenta, bulgur tabbouleh, breakfast quinoa, farro salad.
Video.title: Grains

Video.summary: Martha preserves: duck confit, tomato confit, gravlax (cured salmon appetizer).
Video.title: Preserving

Video.summary: Martha and chef Cesare Casella prepare legumes: seven bean salad, Boston baked beans.
Video.title: Legumes

Video.summary: Martha prepares shrimp: cocktail, scampi, traditional shrimp boil, simple grilled shrimp.
Video.title: Shrimp

Video.summary: Martha makes chicken: chicken paillard, chicken pot pie, spatchcocked chicken.
Video.title: Chicken

Video.summary: Martha shows how pâte ŕ choux creates swans, coconut éclairs, and pink croquembouche.)
Video.title: Series Premiere

Video.summary: Potager Pots, Fishing Trip, Organizing Shoes, Cooking and Scaling Fish, Collecting McCoy Pottery
Video.title: Fishing Trip, Cooking Fish, Pottery

Video.summary: Knot Herb Garden, Picnic Sandwiches, Sage Street Antique Store, Painted Flower Pots
Video.title: Knot Herb Garden, Picnic Sandwich

Video.summary: Ribbons and Bows, Peter Rabbit Garden Cake, How to Cut Grapefruit, Organizing a Pantry
Video.title: Ribbons and Bows, Peter Rabbit Garden Cake

Image.alt: Ribbons and Bows, Peter Rabbit Garden Cake
Ribbons and Bows, Peter Rabbit Garden Cake
Ribbons and Bows, Peter Rabbit Garden Cake

Video.summary: Hyacinth Vase, Sal's Herb Garden, Hot to Use Knives, Making Natural Cleansers, Quick Cook: Risotto
Video.title: Forcing Hyacinths, Natural Cleansers, Risotto

Video.summary: Bottle Gardening, Decorative Wall Painting, Decorative Boxes, Dishwashing Bottles Good Thing
Video.title: Wall Painting, Decorative Boxes

Video.summary: Painting Porches, Gathering Eggs, Country Breakfast, Opening a Paint Can
Video.title: Painting Porches, Country Breakfast

Video.summary: Poppies, Tin Man, Salad Dressing, Tea, Madeleines, Napkins
Video.title: Poppies, Salad Dressing, Tea, Madeleines
